context.text:
Per-band dispatch ceiling for llm-d flow control. Two arms ship as
UsageLimitPolicy plugins under
pkg/epp/framework/plugins/flowcontrol/usagelimits/<arm>/policy.go,
each registered in cmd/epp/runner/runner.go via fwkplugin.Register
(existing plugin pattern at runner.go:509).

Treatment (quartic-ceiling-policy): ceiling[i] = 1.0 - i/(N-1) * sat^4,
where sat = SaturationDetector.Saturation(ctx, pool) and N = active
priority bands from shard.AllOrderedPriorityLevels(). Parameter-free.

Control (constant-ceiling-control): ceiling[i] = 1.0 for all i,
delivered through the same plugin framework to isolate framework
overhead from algorithm effect.

Both arms attach via flowControl.usageLimitPolicyPluginRef in the
EndpointPickerConfig CR. Two priority tiers (critical=100,
sheddable=-50) are defined as InferenceObjective CRs.
